commit_scope: Restore the kernel-router public-gate service binding after retargeting the legacy attention router to the BML service caused public native mutation gate traffic to fall through to Python. The production-manifest attention router points back to coherence-api-kernel-canary.

local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27973645678 deployed 99d29c10 but failed Verify kernel public canary. The canary showed X-Form-Native-Public-Gate POST /api/ideas returning Python/Pydantic 422 with no X-Form-Router, proving the cross-service retarget disturbed the kernel public-gate routing.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger production Traefik native front door
deploy_validation.notes: After deploy, the public kernel canary must pass again. The no-Accept attention edge remains a separate observed gap and must not be healed by breaking the public mutation gate.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, deploy, and public kernel canary proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27973645678 passed Sync tracked deploy script, Roll forward VPS, and Verify public deployment, then failed Verify kernel public canary.
The failed public canary showed repeated status=422 router=none for X-Form-Native-Public-Gate POST /api/ideas, with a Python validation body requiring potential_value and estimated_cost.
Public health after the failed canary reported deployed_sha 99d29c102885e65449a22180fe675bd832e12f80, so the bad router target was live and needed a restore commit.
Accept-bearing /api/attention/kernel-runtime still returned api_attention_kernel_runtime, so this restore preserves BML attention while recovering the public mutation gate.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public X-Form-Native-Public-Gate and no-header native default mutation canaries should return native-kernel receipts again after the production-manifest attention router points back to coherence-api-kernel-canary.
test_flows: static Hostinger deploy path check requires the production-manifest attention router to target coherence-api-kernel-canary.
ordinary Accept-bearing attention requests continue to return api_attention_kernel_runtime.
